Index.heroEyebrow: The Ultimate Programmatic Video Tool for React Developers ✨
Index.heroHeadline: Build & Render Dynamic Videos Code-First. No After Effects Needed.
Index.heroSubheadline: The only headless React engine that renders pixel-perfect videos using JSON pipelines, Remotion springs, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI.
Index.problem1: Scaling video production manually is slow, expensive, and unscalable.
Index.problem2: Most programmatic video tools force you to learn clunky proprietary syntaxes.
Index.problem3: Bridging dynamic data (like AI or LLM output) to video generation is a nightmare.
Index.agitate: Every minute you spend manually adjusting keyframes or fighting with complex FFmpeg scripts is time wasted. Your competitor's AI agent is already generating thousands of personalized, branded videos programmatically, completely headless.
Index.problemTransition: What if you could build stunning video compositions just by writing the React, Tailwind, and Shadcn components you already know?
Index.valueItem1: Declarative JSON API perfectly tailored for LLMs and AI Agents.
Index.valueItem2: 11 Built-In Elegant Animations powered by Remotion Springs.
Index.socialProof1: "I struggled to connect our AI agent output to a video renderer. With Sawabona, I just pass a JSON config and get a beautiful Shadcn-styled video out. It's magic."
Index.socialProof2: "We used to pay thousands for After Effects templates. Now we program our variations in React. Testing 10x more creatives practically for free."
Index.socialProof3: "Native React rendering with Tailwind gave us the exact same UI design system in our videos as our app. An absolute game changer."
Index.transQuickWin: Quick Win: Render your first data-driven React video in minutes.
Index.transCompound: Compound Effect: Abstract your entire video logic into reusable code components.
Index.transAdvantage: Unfair Advantage: Generate deeply personalized, hyper-targeted videos on the fly using Live JSON Data.
Index.trans10x: Exponential Scaling: From a bottlenecked rendering queue to an automated, headless video API running 24/7.
Index.secQuestion: Will you keep clicking around timelines manually, or will you build a headless video engine today?

Docs.title: Getting Started
Docs.desc: @sawabona/motion-engine is a React Headless Video Rendering Package. It allows you to declaratively define Scenes, Animations, and Settings via JSON objects, rendered perfectly frame-by-frame via Remotion.
Docs.architectureDesc: The project strictly follows Atomic Design methodologies:
Docs.atomDesc: Pure UI Elements like Shadcn Buttons and Typography.
Docs.organismDesc: The Engine wrappers (`AnimateWrapper`) that execute contextual Remotion hooks safely.
Docs.configDesc: The Configuration object expects a specific structure validated by `Zod`.
Docs.engineDesc: This is the single entry point you will export and run inside your app. It validates your config, reduces duration requirements, and mounts the Remotion Player or CLI Engine.
Docs.hooksDesc: Custom hooks like `useFadeIn` and `useSlideIn` are driven by Remotion's spring physics. V2 and V3 introduced advanced physics hooks like `useCamera` for smooth Panning/Zooming, `useInteraction` for virtual cursor overlays, `useVFX` for chromatic aberration and motion blur, and `usePhysics` for organic spring-driven particles.
Docs.llmDesc: Building an AI agent to generate commercial videos? Read our comprehensive LLM-friendly usage guide to feed into your system's instruction context.
Docs.apiRefDesc: The Motion Engine accepts a highly structured JSON strictly validating through Zod. Here is the comprehensive configuration standard that supports all advanced V3 features like Camera, Physics, VFX, Depth, Interactions, and Audio Reactivity.
